name: vehicles
checklist: doc 13 M4 — a beat-up buggy sits a few metres ahead on open ground.
Board the driver seat, drive: the hull moves under server-auth control; both clients see the same pose.
A passenger can board seat 2 and ride; only the driver's input steers.
The small tank (6 units) runs dry after a short drive — throttle then makes no force, the hull coasts.
Add the jerry can (refuel) to top the tank back up.
Ram a zombie at speed to damage it; a hard head-on crash chips hull hp and can wreck it, ejecting riders.
Restart the preview after a save: the buggy rehydrates at its resting pose with its fuel/hp, seats empty.
